name: W11 Morning Flow — Bodyweight Spine + Hip (All Days, Variety Week)
description: 15 min bodyweight floor flow — **universal W11 morning flow, used every training day** (Mon push / Tue KB / Wed pull / Thu KB / Fri legs). **Same shape as W10, rotated moves for variety.** Three-part: spine primer → bodyweight work → deep stretch arc. All bodyweight, no equipment beyond a mat. W11 swaps in puppy-pose cat-cow, plank bird-dog, down-dog knee-to-head, hip-circle, and mountain-to-pigeon flow. Scorpion stays — signature move, still working. Day-specific therapeutic work (doorframe pec-minor stretch, 90s pigeon for QL, dead hang + scap pull-ups) lives outside this flow — do separately when needed.

sets.name: Primer — Wake the Spine (~3 min)

exercises.notes: Knees under hips, chest sinks toward the floor with arms extended forward, hold 2-3 breaths. Then walk back into cat-cow. **Variety on W10's cat-cow** — adds the shoulder/lat opener to the spine wave.
Slow flow. **W10 had this too — keep it, the spine wave is the bridge into the rest of the flow.**
30s each side. Deeper than W10 — by W11 the rotation should reach further.

sets.notes: Slightly different opener than W10 — puppy-pose cat-cow adds the lat opener that the seated banded flow does on Tuesday.

sets.name: Work Block — Bodyweight Activation (~5 min)

exercises.notes: 5 slow reps. Same as W10 — keep it, this move covers a lot of ground per rep.
45s alternating. From down-dog, draw one knee toward the forehead, hold a beat, switch. **Core + hip + shoulder integration** — replaces W10's plank-to-down-dog.
45s alternating. Plank with opposite-arm-and-leg lift — harder version of W10's kneeling bird-dog. Anti-rotation under more load.
45s slow. Same as W10 — too good to skip, the slow-hold version stays in.
30s each side. Same as W10 — windmill on the floor. Should feel cleaner than W10 if the lateral hinge cue is sticking.

sets.notes: Slightly more demanding than W10 (plank bird-dog + down-dog knee-to-head are both more challenging than their W10 equivalents). If anything feels heavy, slow the tempo or drop the reps — don't push.

sets.name: Yoga Flow — Deep Stretch Arc (~7 min)

exercises.notes: 30s each side. **Stays — the signature move and the named winner from W10D2.** Should feel deeper this week.

30s each direction. Quadruped hip circles — slow, full ROM, draw big circles with the knee. **Replaces W10's 90-90** — different hip pattern, same goal of getting the hip joint moving in all planes before deep static stretches.
30s each side. Same as W10 — hip flexor + adductor + back-leg quad. Drop to elbows if accessible.
Bodyweight, slow. **Stays every week** — mirrors the Tuesday loaded cossack.
30s each side. **Replaces W10's active pigeon** — flowing entry from down-dog/mountain into pigeon. Adds the transition practice that static pigeon doesn't have.
45s, slow pulses. **Replaces W10's frog-stretch** with the gentle pulse version — more dynamic, easier to bail if it's not opening up that day. Adductors get the same treatment.

sets.notes: Continuous arc — flow between shapes, breathe deeply. Same logic as W10 but the moves rotated for variety.

sets.name: 📍 Day-Specific Add-On — Pick by Today's Training (~3-5 min)

exercises.notes: **📍 PUSH DAYS — KEY W9 PROTOCOL MOVE.** 30s each at LOW / MID / HIGH elbow positions. Arm bent 90°, forearm on door frame, step through and rotate torso AWAY. **Desk work continuously re-tightens pec minor — daily.**
**📍 PUSH DAYS** — Active side of the pec-minor fix. Lower trap + rotator cuff; pulls shoulder blade down and back.
**📍 PUSH DAYS** — Serratus activation, helps unstick a tight pec minor.
**📍 PUSH DAYS (optional)** — Slow rotator cuff work. Add if shoulder feels off.
**📍 PUSH DAYS (optional)** — Pins shoulder blades in corrected position; counteracts forward roll from pec tightness.
**📍 PULL DAYS** — 25s. Decompress shoulders, warm grip.
**📍 PULL DAYS** — Scapulae retracting only, no elbow bend. Crisp scap engagement before loaded pulls.
**📍 LEGS DAYS — W8 QL-SPASM PROTOCOL.** 90s each side (longer than the universal flow's mountain-to-pigeon). The long hold is what lets QL/psoas release. **Non-negotiable on legs day.**
**📍 LEGS DAYS** — 60s each side. Gentle twist for the QL. Lacrosse-ball QL roll above iliac crest beforehand if available.
**📍 LEGS DAYS (optional)** — Deep hip flexor stretch. Add if hip flexors feel tight.
**📍 LEGS DAYS (optional)** — Most direct quad + hip flexor stretch. Wall or couch.

sets.notes: **Pick today's day-specific protocol — push / pull / legs.** ~3-5 min total. KB days (Tue/Thu) skip this block — the in-workout banded prep covers the equivalent.

tips: **Same shape as W10, rotated moves.** Variety keeps the flow interesting — same intent, different shapes.
**15 min main flow + 3-5 min day-specific add-on** — universal across W11 (Mon push / Tue KB / Wed pull / Thu KB / Fri legs).
**Scorpion + cossack BW + lizard pose stay every week** — those are the durable spine + hip + adductor anchors.
Plank bird-dog and down-dog knee-to-head are slightly harder than W10's equivalents. Slow the tempo if needed.
**Day-specific add-on block at the end** — push days do the pec-minor protocol, pull days do dead hang + scap pull, legs days do 90s pigeon + supine twist. KB days skip the add-on.
If short on time: scorpion + lizard + cossack BW + mountain-to-pigeon, plus today's day-specific add-on.
formPhilosophy: Same as W10. Variety = different shapes hitting the same patterns. Scorpion-family spine work + hip openers + adductor stretches. Designed for home, structured around the in-workout banded prep's logic.
